title: Infrastructure Support Engineer (Data Centre)
description:
• 1-year contract, renewable
  • Government project
  • Hybrid work arrangement


Responsibility

  • Oversee the day-to-day operations of ICT infrastructure components which comprise servers, hosting, network infrastructure, end-user computing and data centre operations
  • Manage the CCSs appointed Agency Facilities Management contractors and EUCD contractors;
  • Implement projects within their emplaced practice to ensure service delivery and support to meet the intended availability, continuity and capacity requirements;
  • Ensure compliance to Governments IM8 policies and CCSs ICT policies and Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs);
  • Manage Infrastructure projects;
  • Overall responsible for hardware, software and subscription maintenance contracts for infrastructure and data centre operations;
  • Manage the procurement and leasing of end-user computing requirements;
  • Plan and work with the appointed Agency Facilities Management contractors and awarded ICT contractors to implement and deploy infrastructure projects and end-user computing devices to end-users;
  • Plan and lead the overall IT infrastructure procurement activities, in particular tender specifications compilation, tendering, tender evaluation, recommendation & award;
  • Manage incidents and problems for system related issues;
  • Ensure availability of ICT infrastructure systems and data centre facilities equipment;
  • Monitor infrastructure performance;
  • Perform systems log review;
  • Follow-up and ensure audit findings are addressed;
  • Follow-up and ensure the compliance to the remediation timeline for security vulnerability scanning;
  • Plan, coordinate and execute the annual Table-Top exercise with the appointed contractor;
  • Coordinate the disaster recovery plan and execution of the annual disaster recovery testing of CCSs ICT systems.

Requirement

  • Diploma/Degree in IT, Facilities Management, or related field
  • Experience in IT operations or data centre operations;
  • CITPM (Certified ICT Project Management Programme) or PMP (Project Management Professional) or COMIT (Certification in Outsourcing Management for IT) or an equivalent certification; or
  • Information Technology Infrastructure Library (ITIL) certification or equivalent IT Service Management certification.
  • At least 3 years of experience in running IT infrastructure operations or data centre operations;
  • ICT project management and people management skills;
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills;
  • Results and customer oriented;
  • Team player with organization and people management skills; and
  • Good communication skills, both oral and written.

Additional Requirement

  • Certification in CompTIA Network will be an added advantage;
  • Certification in AWS Cloud Practitioner will be an added advantage;
  • Certification in CISSP (Certified Information Systems Security Professional), CISA (Certified Information Systems Auditor), CCAK (Certificate of Cloud Auditing Knowledge) or an equivalent certification will be an added advantage;
  • Certification in Certified Cloud Security Professional (CCSP) will be an added advantage;
  • Knowledge of Singapore Government procurement and ICT governance processes is preferred;
  • Knowledge of the Government IM8 policies is preferred;
  • Experience in managing security vulnerability testing with external security consultant, follow-up remediations and putting up risk assessment & risk acceptance to the relevant agencys authority is preferred;
  • Experienced with management cloud infrastructure and services / certification with GPC, GCC (i.e. AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) or equivalent cloud platforms is preferred

postedCompany.description:
We are an award-winning, full-service Web Solutions Company based in Singapore. Websparks Pte Ltd is formed in 2008.


Each of our Websparkers should be Curious, Collaborative, Committed, and a Challenger. We wake up daily to deliver extraordinary digital experiences to our customers.


Websparks is an ISO 27001 certified company. ISO/IEC 27001 is the leading international standard for information security management and helps organizations to keep information assets secure. Websparks is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company. We have demonstrated to external auditors our commitment to quality. We are able to consistently provide products and services that meet our client’s requirements.


Websparks is named as APN Select Consulting Partner as a result of our investment in technical resource development aimed at ensuring efficient usage of the AWS cloud. Websparks is certified as a Microsoft Gold Application Development, Silver Application Integration and DevOps Partner. We are equipped with the tools and resources to deliver the best quality of software.


Websparks is a Progress Gold Partner. As a Progress partner, we play a key role in helping organizations of all sizes – across all industries – transform and run their businesses. Websparks is a Sitecore Solution Partner.  Solution partners bring their customers' unique visions to dynamic life on their websites with the Sitecore Experience Platform.
postedCompany.name: WEBSPARKS PTE. LTD.
